hero.quote: It is education that either keeps a nation living as a free, independent, glorious, high society; or leaves it to captivity and misery.
hero.description: We are building innovative educational bridges between Turkey and Europe. Through our Erasmus+ projects, we bring together youth, educators, and institutions with international opportunities; overcoming the biggest obstacles to development and coloring the future together.
